creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Having exchanged a couple of emails with the submitter, the 
consensus is that the PR should just be closed, since the 
version of the toolkit here is ancient, and there doesn't 
appear to be any demand for this port.  However, if someone 
wants to submit a port based on the current version of ACE, 
I'll be more than happy to look at it.
